purpose: Durable working memory for stable repo facts and repeatable operating knowledge.

durableMemoryExcludes: one-off findings from a single session
implementation advice not yet accepted into roadmap or backbone artifacts

stableRepoFacts.fact: This is a full-stack TypeScript app with a React/Vite frontend and an Express backend.
UI code is primarily under client/src, server wiring under server/, and shared types/schema under shared/schema.ts.
DATABASE_URL is required for local startup and Drizzle-backed roadmap/database scripts.
Admin roadmap work is backed by roadmapProjects, roadmapWorkstreams, and roadmapTasks in shared/schema.ts with storage logic in server/storage.ts.

verificationByChangeType.notes: Regenerate bootstrap artifacts and verify roadmap context is reflected in durable artifacts.
Refresh route surface data and run TypeScript validation.
Database-affecting work may also require npm run db:push when schema is intentionally changed.
Use db:push only when schema changes are intentional and DATABASE_URL is valid.

workflowEntryPoints.workflow: admin roadmap data and KPI logic

currentProductDecisions.decision: Service-oriented roadmap work should follow the planning backbone before implementation when the request changes service model or workflow.
Repeated agent setup work should be converted into backbone automation work rather than normalized as repeated manual exploration.
Bootstrap and durable memory artifacts may self-amend, but product behavior changes still require explicit implementation work.
Backbone automation may write analysis artifacts and backbone docs, but must not silently change schema, business logic, authorization, or user-facing workflows.

recurringRepoIssues.issue: npm run check currently fails on an existing IStorage mismatch in server/storage.ts for previewAiIngestionSupersededCleanup and executeAiIngestionSupersededCleanup.
recurringRepoIssues.impact: TypeScript validation is not currently a clean signal for unrelated changes.

recurringRepoIssues.issue: A separate known TypeScript/iterator issue has also surfaced around matchAll iteration in server/storage.ts.
recurringRepoIssues.impact: Some checks may expose pre-existing compiler targets or iterator compatibility issues outside the current task.

activeRoadmapContext.title: Admin Roadmap Backbone - Agent Bootstrap and Continuous Improvement

openTasks.title: Define success metrics for reduced startup and rediscovery cost
Auto-create or update roadmap tasks from repeated friction patterns

activeRoadmapContext.title: Platform-wide UI and UX Opportunity Analysis

openTasks.title: Standardize sortable, filterable, paginated tables across operations and finance
Introduce drill-in side panels and row detail views to reduce context loss
Improve responsive behavior for wide admin and operations views
Turn dense CRUD forms into guided, task-oriented flows
Add shell-level breadcrumbs, page summaries, and adjacent workflow shortcuts
Redesign association context switching to be more explicit and less error-prone
Upgrade document workflows with stronger metadata affordances and file handling
Refine onboarding and review consoles around next-best-action workflows
Add explicit progress and completion feedback for exports, uploads, and sync actions
Pair analytics with explanations and recommended next actions
Standardize loading, error, and retry states for query-driven pages
Create a global command palette for navigation, recent records, and create actions
